info.title: goldsync
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 Riccardo Gregori
config        Set-up the connections to Azure DevOps instances
test          Test the connection towards all the configured Azure DevOps
instances.
sync          Takes all the bugs from conn 1 or 2 that are not in conn 3, and
creates them.
get-item      Prints the data extracted from a given workitem
show-query    Shows the query that is used to retrieve the bugs from the
source environments.
list-tags     Lists all the tag mappings configured
set-tag       Adds or updates a given tag mapping
help          Display more information on a specific command.
version       Display version information.

commands.name: config
commands.description: Set-up the connections to Azure DevOps instances

options.name: --o1
options.description: Required. The name of the first Azure DevOps organization

options.name: --p1
options.description: Required. The name of the first Azure DevOps project

options.name: --t1
options.description:
Required. The personal access token for the first Azure
DevOps organization

options.name: --area1
options.description:
Required. The name of the area path where the bug should
be created in the target env if read from env1

options.name: --it1
options.description:
Required. The name of the iteration path where the bug
should be created in the target env if read from env1

options.name: --testPhase1
options.description:
Required. The name of the test phase on the target env if
read from env1

options.name: --o2
options.description: Required. The name of the second Azure DevOps organization

options.name: --p2
options.description: Required. The name of the second Azure DevOps project

options.name: --t2
options.description:
Required. The personal access token for the second Azure
DevOps organization

options.name: --area2
options.description:
Required. The name of the area path where the bug should
be created in the target env if read from env1

options.name: --it2
options.description:
Required. The name of the iteration path where the bug
should be created in the target env if read from env2

options.name: --testPhase2
options.description:
Required. The name of the test phase on the target env if
read from env1

options.name: --o3
options.description: Required. The name of the third Azure DevOps organization

options.name: --p3
options.description: Required. The name of the third Azure DevOps project

options.name: --t3
options.description:
Required. The personal access token for the third Azure
DevOps organization

options.name: --assignedToId
options.description: Required. The ID of the user to assign the bugs to

options.name: --assignedToName
options.description: Required. The Name of the user to assign the bugs to

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: sync
commands.description:
Takes all the bugs from conn 1 or 2 that are not in conn 3, and
creates them.

options.name: --origin
options.description: Required. Origin connection to sync from (1 or 2).

options.name: --preview
options.description: If provided, simulates the creation (no action is performed)

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.description: Prints the data extracted from a given workitem

options.name: --id
options.description: Required. The ID of the workitem to get

options.name: --origin
options.description: Required. Origin connection to sync from (1, 2, 3).

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

source environments.
